channel.title: reading on Hi, I am Marlis! 👋
channel.description: Recent content in reading on Hi, I am Marlis! 👋

item.title: Reading Log
item.description: In an attempt to increase my (perceived) accountability and accordingly my reading progress, I hereby start to document what I am currently reading. Ideally, I will summarize suitable books after I have finished them (I plan to start with the book by Timur Kuran). 0% Timur Kuran – Private Truths, Public Lies: The Social Consequences of Preference Falsification 25% Reeves Wiedemann – Billion Dollar Loser: The Epic Rise and Spectacular Fall of Adam Neumann and WeWork
